title: viola capillaris var. araucana
intro: Viola capillaris var. araucana, also known as Yellow Wood Sorrel, is a plant species belonging to the Violet family (Violaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of ascorbic acid, also known as vitamin C, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Viola capillaris var. araucana include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Viola capillaris var. araucana can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support overall well-being and provide relief from colds and flu.
